17.gl: properly, the crop gathered, i.e. (by implication) the autumn (and winter) season; figuratively, ripeness of age
harvest (as the crop), whether the product (grain or fruit) or the (dry) season

18.gl: properly, to mark (so as to be recognized), i.e. to remember; by implication, to mention;  to be male
18.kj: [idiom] burn (incense), [idiom] earnestly, be male, (make) mention (of), be mindful, recount, record(-er), remember, make to be remembered, bring (call, come, keep, put) to (in) re
18.dv: a primitive root; also as denominative from H2145 (זָכָר)

18.gl: to pull off, i.e. (by implication) to expose (as by stripping); specifically, to betroth (as if a surrender); figuratively, to carp at, i.e. defame; to spend the winter
18.kj: betroth, blaspheme, defy, jeopard, rail, reproach, upbraid.
18.dv: a primitive root; also  denominative (from H2779 (חֹרֶף))

18.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
18.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

18.kj: hereby (-in, -with), it, likewise, the one (other, same), she, so (much), such (deed), that, therefore, these, this (thing), thus.

18.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock

18.kj: abhor, (give occasion to) blaspheme, contemn, despise, flourish, [idiom] great, provoke.
18.dv: a primitive root; in Ecclesiastes 12:5, by interchange for H5132 (נוּץ), to bloom

19.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
19.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

19.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
19.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

19.gl: alive; hence, raw (flesh); fresh (plant, water, year), strong; also (as noun, especially in the feminine singular and masculine plural) life (or living thing), whether literally or figuratively
19.kj: [phrase] age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, [phrase] merry, multitude, [phrase] (be) old, qui

19.gl: properly, a goal, i.e. the bright object at adistance travelled towards; hence (figuratively), splendor, or (subjectively) truthfulness, or (objectively) confidence; but usually (adverbially), continually (i.e. to the mo
19.kj: alway(-s), constantly, end, ([phrase] n-) ever(more), perpetual, strength, victory.

19.dv: from H6031 (עָנָה); (practically the same as H6035 (עָנָו), although the margin constantly disputes this, making H6035 (עָנָו) subjective and objectiv

19.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
19.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.

20.gl: to fill or (intransitively) be full of, in a wide application (literally and figuratively)
20.kj: accomplish, confirm, [phrase] consecrate, be at an end, be expired, be fenced, fill, fulfil, (be, become, [idiom] draw, give in, go) full(-ly, -ly set, tale), (over-) flow, fulness

20.gl: violence; by implication, wrong; by meton. unjust gain
20.kj: cruel(-ty), damage, false, injustice, [idiom] oppressor, unrighteous, violence (against, done), violent (dealing), wrong.

20.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
20.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
20.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

20.gl: a compact (because made by passing between pieces of flesh)
20.dv: from H1262 (בָּרָה) (in the sense of cutting (like H1254 (בָּרָא)));

20.gl: to scan, i.e. look intently at; by implication, to regard with pleasure, favor or care
20.kj: (cause to) behold, consider, look (down), regard, have respect, see.

21.gl: to turn back (hence, away) transitively or intransitively, literally or figuratively (not necessarily with the idea of return to the starting point); generally to retreat; often adverbial, again
21.kj: ((break, build, circumcise, dig, do anything, do evil, feed, lay down, lie down, lodge, make, rejoice, send, take, weep)) [idiom] again, (cause to) answer ([phrase] again), [idiom]

21.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
21.kj: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rag

21.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
21.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));
from H6031 (עָנָה); (practically the same as H6035 (עָנָו), although the margin constantly disputes this, making H6035 (עָנָו) subjective and objectiv

21.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
21.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.

21.gl: properly, to wound; but only figuratively, to taunt or insult
21.kj: be (make) ashamed, blush, be confounded, be put to confusion, hurt, reproach, (do, put to) shame.

22.dv: a primitive root; also as denominative from H2145 (זָכָר)

22.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
22.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

22.kj: adversary, chide, complain, contend, debate, [idiom] ever, [idiom] lay wait, plead, rebuke, strive, [idiom] thoroughly.
[phrase] adversary, cause, chiding, contend(-tion), controversy, multitude (from the margin), pleading, strife, strive(-ing), suit.

23.dv: from an unused root meaning to stretch;

23.dv: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;

23.gl: to cramp, literally or figuratively, transitive or intransitive
